label: BrowserUse • pick a dropdown option and save
query: Go to https://fixtures.local/settings, set the timezone dropdown to 'Europe/Berlin', and click Save.
notes: LIVE. Exercises browser_select (the only child tool that mutates a select's value — typing into it is wrong) followed by the save click. The world stores the selected values joined verbatim, so the equals predicate catches both a missed select and a mangled option string. The notifications checkbox is a distractor that must stay untouched.

pages.title: Preferences
pages.bodyText: Preferences. Choose your timezone from the dropdown, then press Save to apply.
